title: 软件工具收藏
content:
通用好用的软件工具收藏

<!--more-->

****

### IDE及开发工具

[Visual Studio Code](https://code.visualstudio.com/)

[Source Insight](https://www.sourceinsight.com/)

[Typora](https://typoraio.cn/)

[Beyond Compare](https://www.beyondcomparepro.com/download)

[VMware Workstation](https://www.vmware.com/cn/products/workstation-pro.html)

[SecureCRT and SecureFX](https://www.vandyke.com/products/index.html)

[UartAssist串口调试助手](http://www.cmsoft.cn/resource/101.html)

[Wireshark · Go Deep](https://www.wireshark.org/)

[NetAssist网络调试助手](http://www.cmsoft.cn/resource/102.html)

[TortoiseGit](https://tortoisegit.org/)

[draw.io](https://www.drawio.com/)

[STM32Cube](https://www.st.com/en/development-tools/stm32-software-development-tools.html)

[Keil](https://www.keil.com/)

[IAR](https://www.iar.com/)

[Qt](https://www.qt.io/zh-cn/)

[飞秋](http://www.feiq18.com/)

[MATLAB](https://ww2.mathworks.cn/products/matlab.html)

[LabVIEW](https://www.ni.com/zh-cn/shop/product/labview.html)

[Quartus prime](https://www.intel.cn/content/www/cn/zh/products/details/fpga/development-tools/quartus-prime.html)

### 文件处理

[7-zip](https://www.7-zip.org/)

[WinRAR](https://www.winrar.com.cn/)

[Encrypto](https://macpaw.com/encrypto)

### 多媒体

[foobar2000](https://www.foobar2000.org/)

[PotPlayer](https://potplayer.tv/?lang=zh_CN)

### 其他

[Snipaste](https://zh.snipaste.com/)

[Everything](https://www.voidtools.com/zh-cn/)

[DiskGenius](https://www.diskgenius.cn/)

[微PE工具箱](https://www.wepe.com.cn/)

[Calibre](https://calibre-ebook.com/)

[欧路词典](https://dict.eudic.net/)
